master_cv:
# Siddharth Saminathan — CV

## Profile

**AI Product Engineer** specializing in **manufacturing enterprise quality digitalization** and production AI systems. 4+ years building and shipping AI that automates mission-critical enterprise workflows — from agentic quality management (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, 8D) to real-time AI products at scale. I take systems from concept to production and optimize them relentlessly: latency, cost, reliability, and user outcomes. Multi-agent orchestration, tool-driven architectures, and memory systems. What I build doesn't just respond — it improves over time.

## Contact

- **Phone:** +91 7299707403
- **Email:** siddharthsaminathan99@gmail.com
- **Location:** Chennai, India
- **Portfolio:** https://emotenow.app/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/siddharthsaminathan

## Education

- **M.Sc. Statistics and Machine Learning** — Linköping University, Sweden (2020–2022)
- **B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering** — SRM University, India (2016–2020)

## Skills

| Category | Technologies |
|----------|-------------|
| **Programming** | Python, SQL |
| **AI Systems & Agentic Architectures** | LLM APIs, RAG pipelines, embeddings, prompt engineering, tool calling, multi-model routing, agentic workflows, LangChain/LangGraph |
| **Backend & Real-Time Systems** | FastAPI, Redis (caching, queues), PostgreSQL, REST APIs, async pipelines, WebSockets, SSE streaming |
| **System Design & Orchestration** | Stateful systems, workflow orchestration, memory systems, context modeling, distributed pipelines |
| **Infra & Observability** | Docker, AWS, Fly.io, logging, tracing, metrics, performance optimization |
| **Data & Analytics** | ETL pipelines, data validation, Power BI, Tableau |

## Languages

- English (Fluent)
- Tamil
- Hindi

## Work Experience

### AI Engineer — Omnex Systems, Chennai (Jul 2025 – Present)

Omnex is an **Enterprise AI Quality Platform (EQMS)** serving global manufacturing. I built their agentic AI system for end-to-end manufacturing quality digitalization — automating the core quality engineering workflows that automotive, aerospace, and industrial OEMs run on.

- Built a production multi-agent AI system that automates end-to-end manufacturing quality workflows: DFMEA (Design Failure Mode), PFMEA (Process Failure Mode), Control Plans, and 8D corrective action — reducing manual engineering effort and improving consistency across global supply chains.
- Designed a tool-driven orchestration layer that dynamically selects tools, routes data across internal and external enterprise systems, and executes multi-step quality workflows (generate → validate → update → act) with full traceability.
- Enabled context-aware quality decisioning: the system maps inputs to production hierarchies (part/process/plant), retrieves relevant historical quality cases, and suggests structured corrective actions and process updates.
- Improved system performance and reliability — reduced workflow latency (~12.5s → ~8s), built validation layers and retry logic, and instrumented full observability (logging, tracing, metrics) for production manufacturing environments.

### Co-Founder / AI Engineer — Emote (emotenow.app) (Apr 2024 – Present)

- Built and iterated a production AI system that learns from user interactions over time, modeling context, relationships, and behavioral patterns across sessions to improve response quality and continuity.
- Designed and scaled the end-to-end backend architecture (FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL, real-time pipelines, multi-model routing), enabling low-latency, stateful AI interactions in production.
- Drove core system performance and efficiency, reducing latency (~15s → ~3s) and inference cost (~$1.20 → ~$0.023) through pipeline optimization, caching, and model selection.
- Owned the full product loop (0 → 1 → iteration): scaled to 450+ users with 40+ power users, improved activation (20% → 75%) and retention (5% → 13–15%) by continuously shipping improvements based on real user behavior and feedback.

### Data Engineer — Akkodis AB, Sweden (Nov 2022 – Nov 2024)

- Led migration from Azure to PostgreSQL, automating ETL processes using Docker, Argo, and Python.
- Developed and optimized Cron jobs to enhance workflow efficiency.
- Improved Power BI dashboards and metrics pipelines, resulting in 5% increase in business reporting accuracy.
- Constructed automated validation layers to ensure data quality and integrity across enterprise reporting systems.
- Enhanced ETL workflows through Docker containerization and PostgreSQL optimization.

### Data Analyst — Positive Integers Pvt Ltd, Chennai (Sep 2019 – May 2020)

- Analyzed financial datasets related to loan portfolios, credit risk, and customer behavior patterns for an NBFC.
- Developed interactive dashboards using Tableau and Grafana to visualize business KPIs and financial metrics.
- Constructed SQL-based ETL workflows.

## Key Achievements

- **Built Emote from zero:** Took product from vision to production, grew to 450+ users, achieved 13–15% weekly retention through continuous iteration.
- **Latency reduction:** Drove inference latency from ~15s → ~3s and cost from ~$1.20 → ~$0.023 per session at Emote.
- **Enterprise migration:** Led Azure to PostgreSQL data platform migration at Akkodis for Ericsson systems; recognized for improving reporting reliability and delivery.
- **Agentic manufacturing quality system:** Built production multi-agent AI for enterprise quality management (EQMS) at Omnex Systems — automates DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, and 8D across global manufacturing supply chains (12.5s → 8s latency).

## Master's Thesis

Developed a machine learning pipeline utilizing autoencoders and classifiers to predict colorectal cancer metastasis from RNA sequencing data. Employed transfer learning, PCA, and network analysis for biomarker detection in high-dimensional biological datasets.

## Target Roles

- AI Product Engineer
- AI Engineer / Applied AI Engineer
- Founding Engineer (AI)
- Senior Backend Engineer (AI/ML systems)
- Platform Engineer (AI infrastructure)

## Deal-breakers

- No pure frontend roles
- No legacy enterprise IT (Java monoliths, SAP, Oracle)
- No body-shop / mass-recruiter companies (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Accenture, L&T Infotech)
- No roles without any AI/ML component
- Prefer remote or Chennai/Bangalore hybrid

company_intelligence.description: Nicobar is an Indian lifestyle brand offering contemporary clothing, home decor, and accessories with a focus on modern, minimalist design inspired by Indian aesthetics.
company_intelligence.target_customers: Urban, design-conscious individuals seeking modern Indian-inspired lifestyle products
distribution_channels: Retail stores in major Indian cities
company_intelligence.company_culture: Design-driven, sustainable practices, emphasis on craftsmanship and ethical sourcing
notable_facts: Founded by the team behind Good Earth
Known for clean lines and natural fabrics

must_haves: Experience in retail, fashion, or lifestyle industry
Proven track record of launching and scaling products
Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills
nice_to_haves: Knowledge of sustainable and ethical sourcing practices
Background in design or creative fields
hidden_expectations: Ability to balance creative vision with commercial viability
Deep understanding of Nicobar's minimalist aesthetic and brand values
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, design-led environment
Passion for craftsmanship and sustainable practices
day_one_deliverables: Review current product portfolio and identify gaps
Meet with design, sourcing, and marketing teams
Analyze sales data and customer feedback
disqualifiers: No experience in retail or fashion industry

must_haves.evidence: Resume shows earliest professional date Sep 2019 (Data Analyst). By May 2026, total experience ~6.7 years, but product management experience is limited to Co-Founder/AI Engineer at Emote (Apr 2024–present, ~2.1 years) and AI Engineer at Omnex (Jul 2025–present, ~0.8 years). No explicit product management title. Partial match.

must_haves.requirement: Experience in retail, fashion, or lifestyle industry
must_haves.evidence: No experience in retail, fashion, or lifestyle industry. Experience is in manufacturing quality, AI products, data engineering, and financial data analysis.

must_haves.requirement: Proven track record of launching and scaling products
must_haves.evidence: Co-founded Emote, scaled to 450+ users, improved activation and retention. Built agentic AI system at Omnex. Evidence of launching and scaling products, though not in target industry.

must_haves.requirement: Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills
must_haves.evidence: M.Sc. Statistics and Machine Learning, data engineering roles, ETL pipelines, dashboards, performance optimization. Strong analytical background.
Worked with design, sourcing, marketing teams? Not explicitly mentioned. However, co-founder role implies cross-functional collaboration. Partial evidence.

nice_to_haves.evidence: No direct e-commerce experience. Emote is an AI product, not e-commerce.

nice_to_haves.requirement: Knowledge of sustainable and ethical sourcing practices

nice_to_haves.evidence: Based in Chennai, India. Worked at Indian companies (Positive Integers, Omnex). Familiarity likely, but not explicitly demonstrated in resume.

nice_to_haves.requirement: Background in design or creative fields
nice_to_haves.evidence: No design or creative background. Background is CS, statistics, AI engineering.

hidden_expectations.requirement: Ability to balance creative vision with commercial viability
hidden_expectations.evidence: Co-founder role at Emote shows balancing product vision with user growth and retention. Partial evidence.

hidden_expectations.requirement: Deep understanding of Nicobar's minimalist aesthetic and brand values
hidden_expectations.evidence: No evidence of familiarity with Nicobar or its aesthetic.

hidden_expectations.requirement: Comfortable working in a fast-paced, design-led environment
hidden_expectations.evidence: Startup experience (co-founder) suggests comfort with fast-paced environment. Design-led? Not evident.

hidden_expectations.requirement: Passion for craftsmanship and sustainable practices

day_one_deliverables.requirement: Review current product portfolio and identify gaps
day_one_deliverables.evidence: Analytical skills and product experience suggest capability, but no direct evidence of portfolio review.

day_one_deliverables.requirement: Meet with design, sourcing, and marketing teams
day_one_deliverables.evidence: Cross-functional collaboration skills partial; no evidence of working with design/sourcing/marketing teams specifically.

day_one_deliverables.requirement: Analyze sales data and customer feedback
day_one_deliverables.evidence: Strong data analysis skills; experience with dashboards, metrics, user feedback at Emote.
Product roadmap experience not explicitly mentioned, but product ownership at Emote implies roadmap creation.

triggered: No experience in retail or fashion industry

seniority_assessment.notes: Seniority based on total experience (6.7 years) meets Senior threshold. However, product management experience is only ~2.1 years, which may not align with Senior PM expectations.

user_truth.recommendation: Candidate has strong AI/engineering background but lacks retail/fashion/lifestyle industry experience and product management tenure. Not recommended for Senior Product Manager role.

positioning_strategy.angle: Data-driven product leader with AI expertise, positioning to transform Nicobar's product strategy through analytics and personalization, while quickly learning the retail/fashion domain.
positioning_strategy.narrative: I am a product leader with a strong analytical foundation and a proven track record of launching and scaling products. At Emote, I co-founded and scaled an AI product to 450+ users, improving activation and retention through data-driven decisions. My background in statistics and machine learning enables me to uncover insights from customer data and drive product innovation. While I am new to the retail/fashion industry, my experience in building cross-functional teams and my passion for craftsmanship align with Nicobar's values. I am eager to apply my skills to Nicobar's product portfolio, leveraging analytics to identify gaps, optimize the customer journey, and drive growth in the Indian lifestyle market.
